title: Codex visual review S12a panel a1

payload.notes: Codex VISUAL second-model review completed (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of S12a_panel_a01.png, mode=baked, CLI -i path, RC=0。双人身份锁稳定：executor 为蓝衣棕发无须（欢呼半空被截停、兜帽被抓住、像素彩纸冻结），reviewer 为绿衣黑发有须（另一只手把放大镜压在 evaluator 块上），与 identity_refs 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素chibi风格整体统一，style_consistency=4（轻微扣分：背景仪表盘密度区域的渲染质感与前景略有差异，不构成 beat 级缺陷）。构图可读、outputs→evaluator→score→GATE→claim 的管线-即-房间结构与被扣在门前的 +6.2 卡读取顺序清晰，composition_readability=5。本稿为 baked-duo：baked 技术字面清晰、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["EVAL PIPELINE - AUDIT GATE", "DDL", "T-05:12", "outputs", "evaluator", "score", "prior evidence", "Tok yo’", "AUDIT", "claim?", "+6.2", "HOLD · not a claim", "EVAL INTEGRITY"]，覆盖全部 expected_literals（AUDIT/+6.2/EVAL PIPELINE），语义与 audit-gate 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。背景粒子与浮动面板边缘轻度伪影，artifact_severity=1（轻微）。与 Gemini 在 identity 上零分歧（disagreeId=0）。整体 KEEP 倾向：身份/语义/构图稳，无内容变形。
